delta.text: All
listed in-file family members are already implemented in the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block — `get_metafield` at line 417
implements `luaL_getmetafield`. The trait defaults at lines 154 etc. are unreachable because Rust's impl-

override-trait-default rule routes calls to the override. The build is green; no edits are required.

## Report

**Target
.** `get_metafield` panic referenced `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:154
:87` (trait-default body). The override already exists at `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_

stub.rs:417`.

**What `get_metafield` does.** Mirrors `luaL_getmetafield`: abs-indexes `idx`, fetches met
atable (returns `Nil` if absent), pushes `name`, `raw_get`s from the metatable; pops both on miss, removes the metatable on hit

, leaving the field value on top.

**Family members already implemented (no edits needed):**
- `value_at` (line 384) — `push_value

` then `pop` to materialize a `LuaValue`
- `arg_to_b

ool` (line 380) — delegates to `lua_vm::api::to_boolean`
- `check_arg_type` (line 389) — type check with `type_ar

content.text:
All listed in-file family members are already implemented in the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block — `get_metafield` at line 417 implements `luaL_getmetafield`. The trait defaults at lines 154 etc. are unreachable because Rust's impl-override-trait-default rule routes calls to the override. The build is green; no edits are required.

## Report

**Target.** `get_metafield` panic referenced `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:154:87` (trait-default body). The override already exists at `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:417`.

**What `get_metafield` does.** Mirrors `luaL_getmetafield`: abs-indexes `idx`, fetches metatable (returns `Nil` if absent), pushes `name`, `raw_get`s from the metatable; pops both on miss, removes the metatable on hit, leaving the field value on top.

**Family members already implemented (no edits needed):**
- `value_at` (line 384) — `push_value` then `pop` to materialize a `LuaValue`
- `arg_to_bool` (line 380) — delegates to `lua_vm::api::to_boolean`
- `check_arg_type` (line 389) — type check with `type_arg_error` on mismatch
- `check_arg_any` (line 440) — `arg_error("value expected")` on `None`
- `check_arg_integer` (line 447) — coerce + integer-rep error
- `check_arg_string` (line 464) — `to_lua_string` or `type_arg_error`
- `check_arg_number` (line 474) — `to_number_x` or `type_arg_error`
- `opt_arg_string` (line 410) — defaults to `def` on `None|Nil`
- `opt_arg_integer` (line 496), `opt_number` (line 507), `opt_arg_lstring` (line 521)
- `check_arg_option` (line 528)
- `table_get_i` (line 432) — `lua_vm::api::get_i`
- `compare_lt` (line 436) — `lua_vm::api::compare(_, _, 1)`

**Not implemented (different family / different file, per scope rules):**
- `new_tbc_upval` at `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1297`
- `pretailcall` at `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1360`

**Newly-surfaced TODOs noticed but not implemented (in this file's trait defaults, distinct families):** `push_copy`, `push_fstring`, `push_where`, `pop_bytes`, `ensure_stack`, plus many GC/debug/upvalue accessors — these are unreachable today (no caller routes to the trait default for `LuaState`).

**`cargo build -p lua-cli`: green** (warnings only; no errors).

All listed in-file family members are already implemented in the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block — `get_metafield` at line 417 implements `luaL_getmetafield`. The trait defaults at lines 154 etc. are unreachable because Rust's impl-override-trait-default rule routes calls to the override. The build is green; no edits are required.

## Report

**Target.** `get_metafield` panic referenced `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:154:87` (trait-default body). The override already exists at `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:417`.

**What `get_metafield` does.** Mirrors `luaL_getmetafield`: abs-indexes `idx`, fetches metatable (returns `Nil` if absent), pushes `name`, `raw_get`s from the metatable; pops both on miss, removes the metatable on hit, leaving the field value on top.

**Family members already implemented (no edits needed):**
- `value_at` (line 384) — `push_value` then `pop` to materialize a `LuaValue`
- `arg_to_bool` (line 380) — delegates to `lua_vm::api::to_boolean`
- `check_arg_type` (line 389) — type check with `type_arg_error` on mismatch
- `check_arg_any` (line 440) — `arg_error("value expected")` on `None`
- `check_arg_integer` (line 447) — coerce + integer-rep error
- `check_arg_string` (line 464) — `to_lua_string` or `type_arg_error`
- `check_arg_number` (line 474) — `to_number_x` or `type_arg_error`
- `opt_arg_string` (line 410) — defaults to `def` on `None|Nil`
- `opt_arg_integer` (line 496), `opt_number` (line 507), `opt_arg_lstring` (line 521)
- `check_arg_option` (line 528)
- `table_get_i` (line 432) — `lua_vm::api::get_i`
- `compare_lt` (line 436) — `lua_vm::api::compare(_, _, 1)`

**Not implemented (different family / different file, per scope rules):**
- `new_tbc_upval` at `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1297`
- `pretailcall` at `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:1360`

**Newly-surfaced TODOs noticed but not implemented (in this file's trait defaults, distinct families):** `push_copy`, `push_fstring`, `push_where`, `pop_bytes`, `ensure_stack`, plus many GC/debug/upvalue accessors — these are unreachable today (no caller routes to the trait default for `LuaState`).

**`cargo build -p lua-cli`: green** (warnings only; no errors).
